title: marshallia obovata var. platyphylla
intro: Marshallia obovata var. platyphylla, also known as the flat-leaved Marshallia, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Marshallia obovata var. platyphylla can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including colds, fever, and digestive issues.
